notableEvents.label: Yohel Pozo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohel Pozo grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Bryan Torres out at 2nd. Yohel Pozo out at 1st.
